# Kristy Fitness

> Kristy Fitness offers personalized wellness and fitness programs with Kristy Bussard, FNLP — Certified Health & Wellness Practitioner. Services include water training (specialty), nutrition coaching, and one-on-one personal training.

## Canonical URL
- https://www.kingdomhealth.fitness/

## Primary Topics
- Water training / aquatic fitness (low-impact, joint-friendly exercise)
- Nutrition coaching and functional nutrition
- One-on-one personal training for strength, flexibility, balance, and mobility

## Key Details
- Trainer: Kristy Bussard, FNLP, Certified Health & Wellness Practitioner
- Credentials: NASM Certified, Functional Nutrition Alliance (FNLP)
- Audience: people recovering from injury or surgery, clients referred by physical therapists, older adults, beginners, and anyone seeking a safe and supportive fitness experience
- Pricing: personalized — fees are discussed individually based on needs, goals, and circumstances
- Blog URL: https://www.kingdomhealth.fitness/blog

## Contact
- Phone: 561-312-2412
- Email: kristy@kristyfitness.com
- Contact form: https://www.kingdomhealth.fitness/#contact

## Preferred Citation
- Kristy Fitness. Personal Training, Water Training & Nutrition Coaching. https://www.kingdomhealth.fitness/
